chapter_title.ar: باب مِيرَاثِ ذَوِي الْأَرْحَامِ مَعَ الْمَوَالِي
chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – Inheritance of the relatives with the Mawali (slave)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/200)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/200)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَيُّ شَيْ‏ءٍ لِلْمَوَالِي فَقَالَ لَيْسَ لَهُمْ مِنَ الْمِيرَاثِ إِلَّا مَا قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَّا أَنْ تَفْعَلُوا إِلى أَوْلِيائِكُمْ مَعْرُوفاً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya and others, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Al Jaham, from Hanan who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘Which thing is for the Mawla (Master)?’ So heasws said: ‘There is nothing for them from the inheritance except what Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic has Said [33:6] except that you should do good to your guardians’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya and others have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn al-Jahm from Hanan who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about what is for a Mawla ’ (Master). He (the Imam) said, ‘There is nothing for them (Mawla’ (Masters)) except what Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, has said, ‘. . . except if you do well-liked favor to your guardians.’ [33:6]”
